argument: Deploy the first public beta of VOLAURA assessment with real user monitoring. Not a mockup — a live, tracked, authenticated beta with actual backend telemetry. Everything breaks at 10x users: API latency under concurrent load, database connection pool exhaustion, auth.session leaks, Supabase RLS policy gaps, and client memory bloat. We’ve built for scale but haven’t seen the load. One monitored beta cohort of 10 real users unblocks all downstream decisions: revenue model validity, swarm agent necessity, and GITA grant evidence. Without this, we optimize for phantom bottlenecks.
strongest_counter: We have 19 P0 blockers in Constitution v1.7 — shipping before compliance risks shaming users or violating NEVER RED / SHAME-FREE LANGUAGE.
evidence_cited: docs/ECOSYSTEM-CONSTITUTION.md §LAW 1, LAW 3; memory/atlas/lessons.md Class 7 (false completion); internal observation: 0 monitoring in prod, no real user timing data.
